rule CDB_FBI_probing_intrusion_into_a_system_mana {

        description = "Detection for FBI probing intrusion into a system managing sensitive surveillance information"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-09"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

    strings:

        $cve1 = "CVE-2024-36694" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "OpenCart" ascii wide nocase

        any of them
}

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Critical Nginx UI flaw CVE-2026-27944 exposes server backups"; content:"CVE-2026-27944"; nocase; sid:2487708; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 50 threat advisories. Of these, 13 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 7 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, UNC-CDB-SWARM-AI. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
